changes.title: The Economics of Trust in Veterinary Care
changes.details: Veterinary fees increased, review completed by Competition and Markets Authority, measures announced to strengthen competition and reduce costs

changes.title: The Best Metaphor
changes.details: Document added with title 'The Best Metaphor' about cargo cults and their relevance to understanding business situations, including a description of practices mimicking Western ones in Melanesia and the use of the term 'cargo cult' metaphorically in science and business.

changes.title: The Incoherence of Liberal Morality
changes.details: Document added: Analysis of liberal morality's selective outrage and its blind spots towards non-Western traditions, with a call for reconstructed universalism.

changes.title: Seeing off Yuan the Second on a Mission to Anxi
changes.details: New blog post added: 'Seeing off Yuan the Second on a Mission to Anxi' by Wang Wei

changes.title: _index
changes.details: Website content added: Introducing David Jones' website, providing links and clippings, occasional notes, longer writing about various topics, and an overview of the site's design principles.

changes.title: The Banach-Tarski Paradox
changes.details: Document created with title 'The Banach-Tarski Paradox', author 'david', categories ['blog'], tags ['maths'], and content about a mathematical paradox involving the decomposition and reassembly of a solid ball in 3D space

changes.title: Pronouncing Don Quixote in La Mancha
changes.details: Document added: Blog post about pronouncing Don Quixote in La Mancha, discussing the pronunciation and translation of the name, and the author's realization that it is said 'Key-Ho-Tay' after all

changes.title: About this website
changes.details: Website about page added with details on its design and structure

changes.title: Getting married in Japan
changes.details: Document added with guide on getting married in Japan, including steps for UK citizens planning to marry in Tokyo

changes.title: Bayesian Thinking
changes.details: Website content added with an article discussing Bayesian Thinking, its basics, and its application in modern epistemology, including a cancer test scenario example.
